'''Jofoger''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="AIR" /> located in the [[Jofoger system/Legends|Jofoger system]] of the [[Periphery/Legends|Periphery]], a region in the [[Tharin sector/Legends|Tharin sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> of [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was situated on the [[Sisar Run/Legends|Sisar Run]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]].<ref name="AIR" />

[[Risiev Credal]] was a [[Human/Legends|Human]]<ref name="AIR" /> [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] around [[28 BBY/Legends|28 BBY]]<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', which establishes [[Risiev Credal]] to be approximately thirty [[Standard year/Legends|standard years]] old by the time of its setting, represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one year before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> who [[Homeworld/Legends|hailed]] from Jofoger and had the appearance common among the population of Humans that had long lived in the area of the Sisar Run. Credal eventually joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and traveled offworld.<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jofoger was mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' subsequently placed the Jofoger [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square S-8.<ref name="TEA" />
